sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100206" key="sunepekpi/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεπεκ-πίνω</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <sense id="n100206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drink off together</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἅμα τινί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.292</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hedyl.</author></bibl>, dub.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
